title: Jhansi Ki Rani
writer: Geza Herczeg, Sudarshan, Adi F. Keeka
plot: Rajguru (Sohrab Modi) decides that Jhansi should get its proper recognition in history. He comes across a young girl Manu (the young Rani Lakshmibai) played by Baby Shikha. Her father has been hit by a carriage driven by an Englis...
